title: How a Man of Faith Fights the Feed (And Why Most Don't)
caption:
He doesn't scroll for nothing.

There's a reason it's the first thing in the morning and the last thing at night. Something in the feed fills a hole — comparison, distraction, the noise that keeps the hard thoughts quiet. And your faith can't compete with that algorithm on the algorithm's terms.

The men who win this battle don't usually go cold turkey. They replace it. Pray when you'd scroll. Read when you'd go to the tab. Text a brother instead of opening the feed. The phone isn't the enemy — what you're feeding with it is.

Ephesians 5:16: "Making the best use of the time, because the days are evil."

That verse hit different before the smartphone existed. Now it's literal.

#faith #discipline #christianmen #godlymen #phonefasting #manofgod #christianity #digitalminimalism
